blended.narrative: Le Relais is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
